data.summary: 插件桥接已处理最近的适配器事件，桥接与运行时观测仅保留汇总数据

notes: This payload is aggregate-only bridge/runtime observability.
It must not expose raw chat text, request identifiers, or verbatim plugin error text.
Cross-layer counters mirror the dispatcher_runtime observability scope so a single bridge subscriber sees the full pipeline.
